'''鈭歫-w-l-dh''' ('''kajawledhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibreise|fibreise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibreise|fibreise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-w-l-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kajawledhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijawledhoko|thijawledhoko]] || [[word:jijawledhoko|jijawledhoko]] || [[word:shijawledhoko|shijawledhoko]] || [[word:kijawledhoko|kijawledhoko]]
|-
